text:
## Headline

Nimbus management hosted its earnings call covering integration plans for the Cirrus Analytics acquisition, updated margin commentary, and capital-return pacing.

## Q&A signals

- Daniel Cho on Cirrus integration: "we expect native Cirrus query capabilities to be generally available inside the Stratus console by the end of fiscal Q4 2026." [Q1]
- Helena Vargas on the margin guide: "we are deliberately leaving room for additional R and D investment in Cirrus post-close" [Q2]
- Daniel Cho on hyperscaler competition: "We have not lost a single seven-figure customer to a hyperscaler-native tool in the last twelve months." [Q7]

## Commitments

- Nimbus expects to close the Cirrus Analytics acquisition by the end of fiscal Q3 2026: "we expect to close the previously announced Cirrus Analytics acquisition by the end of fiscal Q3 2026" [K1]
- Full-year fiscal 2026 non-GAAP operating margin is now guided to approximately 19 percent: "we now expect full-year non-GAAP operating margin to land at approximately 19 percent, up from our prior guidance of 18 percent." [K4]
- Full-year fiscal 2026 revenue guidance was reiterated: "We are reiterating our previously communicated full-year fiscal 2026 revenue guidance of 2.55 to 2.60 billion dollars" [K6]
